_comment: Example only. NOT loaded by verify-trace. Copy entries into trusted-signers.json to enable them. F3 (prompt-qwvu.3): 'dev' role is rejected by the verifier unless --allow-dev-role is passed; the committed registry carries production signers only.

signers.notes: Illustrative operator entry; replace publicKey with a real key before trusting.
Illustrative CI-lane entry; narrower blast radius than operator.
Illustrative dev entry. The verifier REJECTS dev-role entries in trusted-signers.json unless the caller passes --allow-dev-role. A bundle signed under this entry is NOT claim-eligible.
